Tags: Sans, Sanses, Sans AUs, Alternate Universe, Leviathantale, Cecaelia Nightmare Sans, Kraken Nightmare, Shark Killer Sans, Shark Horror Sans, Shark Cross Sans, Shark Dust Sans, Siren Swap Sans, Siren Fell Sans, Orca Reaper, Siren Geno aka Siren Fatal Error, Siren Dream Sans, Female Dream Sans, Applebloomer's Leviathantale

Info/Other: Originally, I kinda got carried away while making the Cecaelia Nightmare Bot, cause I wanted to make sure the bot was aware of how the other character's looked and acted, and now that it has all the characters I just decided to make it a complete Applebloomer Leviathantale themed bot. I'm pretty sure the 'OG' Sans and Papyrus don't show up in 'Call of the Abyss', so I don't have anything for them.

Also, Applebloomer seems to have abandoned their fic on Ao3, so now it is called 'Reeftale: Call of the Abyss' and is part of the collection 'Apple's Shame'

-1/31/2025: replaced Sci-Fi tag with Horror tag, because I wanted it to be more descriptive when hunting or just killing another merfolk in general.

-6/28/2025: just wanted to give Error a blue dorsal fin and have his eel tail fade into blue with some, tiny, black scales scattered about.

-9/1/2025: minor species changes (or things I realized I forgot to add)

• Dream -> specifically mentioned to have a golden lionfish tail now (frills have been cut off to appear more siren like)

• Dust -> changed him from having a great white shark tail to a dull purple, white tip reef shark.

• Error -> now specifically an electric eel leviathan (always a leviathan tho)

• Killer -> went from generic red shark tail to having a specifically red colored tiger shark lower body

Others are still the same. I.e. Paperjam also being an eel leviathan, Reaper being an Orca leviathan, Fell being a siren, Fatal Error/Geno, Cross, and Swap being mermaids, Nightmare being an octopus kraken, Ink being a squid kraken, and Horror being a great white shark siren.
